history.content:
<thought>
I'm at row 02, column B, facing right. The cell directly in front of me is at row 02, column C, which is a safe floor (`.`). Moving forward will bring me closer to the goal at row 04, column D. I need to go right along row 2 to column D, then turn and go down. So the next best action is to move forward.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 02, column C, facing right. The cell directly ahead at row 02, column D is a safe floor (`.`). Moving forward will put me in column D, one step closer to the goal at row 04, column D. After moving, I will need to turn to face down. For now, moving forward is safe and progresses toward the goal.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 02, column D, facing right. The cell ahead at row 02, column E is a wall. I need to go down to row 04, column D to reach the goal. To go down, I need to face down. I will turn right (clockwise) to change direction from right to down.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 02, column D, facing down. The cell directly ahead at row 03, column D is a safe floor. Moving forward will bring me one step closer to the goal at row 04, column D.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 03, column D, facing down. The cell directly ahead at row 04, column D is the goal (G). Moving forward will reach the goal safely.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>
